ucs.title: [LLM] Gamaredon (Aqua Blizzard / Shuckworm) GammaLoad chain — Office/Explorer spawning wscript/mshta against VBS/LNK in user-writable paths
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Gamaredon initial-access-to-execution chain: a weaponized Office document (often via remote template injection T1221) or a USB-borne LNK (T1091) drops a VBS/HTA stager (GammaLoad / GammaSteel / Pterodo) into %TEMP%, %APPDATA% or %PUBLIC% and is launched by wscript.exe / cscript.exe / mshta.exe / powershell.exe spawned by winword/excel/outlook/explorer. This parent->child + payload-path combination is far more specific than 'wscript saw a .vbs' and is the well-documented Gamaredon delivery footprint reported by CERT-UA, Symantec/Shuckworm, ESET, Microsoft (Aqua Blizzard) and
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_path) as image values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmdline from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","explorer.exe")) (Processes.process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","cmd.exe")) (Processes.process IN ("*\\Users\\Public\\*","*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Templates\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*") OR Processes.process IN ("*.vbs*","*.vbe*","*.hta*","*.lnk*","*.sfx*","*.cmd*")) NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename host as dest | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Gamaredon (Aqua Blizzard) GammaLoad / Pterodo VBS-stager chain
let _office_or_shell = dynamic(["winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let _interpreters   = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"                                  // skip machine accounts
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_office_or_shell)
| where FileName in~ (_interpreters)
// Gamaredon stagers live in user-writable paths and end in vbs/vbe/hta/lnk/sfx
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (".vbs",".vbe",".hta",".lnk",".sfx",".cmd")
    or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\\(Users\\Public|AppData\\Roaming|AppData\\Local\\Temp|AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Templates|ProgramData)\\"
// Strip very common benign Office add-in templates
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("\\Microsoft\\Office\\","OfficeClickToRun"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent     = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child      = FileName,
          ChildCmd   = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildPath  = FolderPath,
          SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Gamaredon (Aqua Blizzard) GammaLoad / Pterodo VBS-stager chain — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688
let _office_or_shell = dynamic(["winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","outlook.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let _interpreters   = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688                                              // process-create (cmdline auditing must be on)
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in (_office_or_shell)
| where ChildLeaf  in (_interpreters)
| where CommandLine has_any (".vbs",".vbe",".hta",".lnk",".sfx",".cmd")
    or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\\(Users\\Public|AppData\\Roaming|AppData\\Local\\Temp|AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\Templates|ProgramData)\\"
| where not(CommandLine has_any ("\\Microsoft\\Office\\","OfficeClickToRun"))
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          Parent = ParentProcessName,
          Child  = NewProcessName,
          CommandLine,
          TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Gamaredon GammaLoad / Pterodo Office-spawned Script Interpreter
id: 7c6d2bb1-3fb6-4d2f-9a31-9b5d9c1f0a31
status: experimental
description: Detects Gamaredon (Aqua Blizzard / Shuckworm / Primitive Bear) initial-access chain — Office or Explorer spawning a script interpreter against a VBS/HTA/LNK payload in a user-writable directory.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/aqua-blizzard
  - https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/threat-intelligence/shuckworm-gamaredon-espionage
  - https://cert.gov.ua/article/40240
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1221
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.005
  - attack.t1218.005
  - attack.g0047
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\winword.exe'
      - '\excel.exe'
      - '\powerpnt.exe'
      - '\outlook.exe'
      - '\explorer.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
  selection_payload:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '.vbs'
      - '.vbe'
      - '.hta'
      - '.lnk'
      - '.sfx'
      - '\Users\Public\'
      - '\AppData\Roaming\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Templates\'
      - '\ProgramData\'
  filter_office_addins:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '\Microsoft\Office\'
      - 'OfficeClickToRun'
  condition: all of selection_* and not filter_office_addins
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate Office macro-enabled templates auto-installed via group policy
  - IT admin scripts deployed to %ProgramData%
level: high
ucs.rationale: Gamaredon is the most prolific Russian state crew against Ukrainian targets and their delivery is unusually formulaic compared with other GRU/FSB clusters: weaponised Office docs with remote-template injection (the maldoc itself is empty) drop a VBS or HTA stager (GammaLoad, GammaSteel, GammaDrop, Pterodo, Pteranodon) into %APPDATA% / %PUBLIC% and execute it via wscript/mshta. They also rely on US

ucs.title: [LLM] Gamaredon (Trident Ursa / Primitive Bear) DDNS C2 — high subdomain rotation under .ru / dynamic-DNS parents from script hosts
ucs.description: Hunts Gamaredon's hallmark C2 footprint: rapidly rotating third-level labels under a small set of parent domains (Russian-registered .ru / .online / .website domains plus dynamic-DNS providers ddns.net, hopto.org, myftp.org, sytes.net, zapto.org). Initiated by wscript/cscript/mshta/powershell — i.e. the same stagers from the previous UC. Unit42 (Trident Ursa) and ESET have reported tens of thousands of disposable Gamaredon subdomains per parent, which is the strongest behavioural signature this actor produces.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime dc(All_Traffic.dest) as subdomain_count values(All_Traffic.dest) as subdomains values(All_Traffic.app) as process from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.app IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe")) (All_Traffic.dest="*.ddns.net" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.hopto.org" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.myftp.org" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.myftp.biz" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.sytes.net" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.zapto.org" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.serveftp.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.ddnsking.com" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.ru" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.online" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.website" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.space" OR All_Traffic.dest="*.cloud") by All_Traffic.src host All_Traffic.app | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | rex field=dest "(?<parent_domain>[^.]+\.[^.]+)$" | stats sum(count) as hits dc(dest) as subdomain_count values(dest) as subdomains values(app) as process by src host parent_domain | where subdomain_count >= 5 | sort - subdomain_count
ucs.kql:
// Gamaredon (Trident Ursa) DDNS C2 — rapid subdomain rotation under known parents, by script hosts
let _gamaredon_parents = dynamic([
    "ddns.net","hopto.org","myftp.org","myftp.biz","ddnsking.com",
    "sytes.net","zapto.org","serveftp.com","redirectme.net","servehttp.com"
]);
let _gamaredon_tlds    = dynamic([".ru",".online",".website",".space",".site",".cloud"]);
let _stagers           = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe"]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| where isnotempty(RemoteUrl)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_stagers)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
// Strip the leading host label to get the registered parent
| extend Lower         = tolower(RemoteUrl)
| extend Labels        = split(Lower, ".")
| extend ParentDomain  = strcat(tostring(Labels[array_length(Labels)-2]), ".", tostring(Labels[array_length(Labels)-1]))
| extend TldDot        = strcat(".", tostring(Labels[array_length(Labels)-1]))
| where ParentDomain in (_gamaredon_parents) or TldDot in (_gamaredon_tlds)
| summarize SubdomainCount = dcount(Lower),
            FirstSeen      = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen        = max(Timestamp),
            SampleHosts     = make_set(Lower, 25),
            DistinctIPs     = dcount(RemoteIP),
            ConnCount       = count()
            by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, ParentDomain
| where SubdomainCount >= 5                                       // >=5 distinct labels under one parent in 24h
| order by SubdomainCount desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Gamaredon (Trident Ursa) DDNS C2 — Sentinel ASIM (works for MDE / Sysmon / FW connectors)
let _gamaredon_parents = dynamic([
    "ddns.net","hopto.org","myftp.org","myftp.biz","ddnsking.com",
    "sytes.net","zapto.org","serveftp.com","redirectme.net","servehttp.com"
]);
let _gamaredon_tlds    = dynamic([".ru",".online",".website",".space",".site",".cloud"]);
let _stagers           = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe"]);
ImDnsActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where isnotempty(DnsQuery)
| extend Lower        = tolower(DnsQuery)
| extend Labels       = split(Lower, ".")
| extend ParentDomain = strcat(tostring(Labels[array_length(Labels)-2]), ".", tostring(Labels[array_length(Labels)-1]))
| extend TldDot       = strcat(".", tostring(Labels[array_length(Labels)-1]))
| where ParentDomain in (_gamaredon_parents) or TldDot in (_gamaredon_tlds)
| summarize SubdomainCount = dcount(Lower),
            FirstSeen      = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen       = max(TimeGenerated),
            SampleHosts    = make_set(Lower, 25),
            QueryCount     = count()
            by DvcHostname, SrcIpAddr, ParentDomain
| where SubdomainCount >= 5
| order by SubdomainCount desc
ucs.rationale: Gamaredon's operational tradecraft is to register hundreds of cheap .ru / .online / .website domains and to fan out third-level labels per victim, plus heavy use of free dynamic-DNS providers (ddns.net, hopto.org, myftp.org, sytes.net) — Unit42's Trident Ursa report and ESET's Gamaredon tracking both highlight subdomain churn as the defining signature, with single parents like *.ddns.net hosting t
